zereshk-polo-lezzet.name: Zereshk Polo
instructions: 1. Roast the back with plenty of water in a pot.
2. Melt the margar in another pot and add salça.
4. 5 tablespoons of chicken juice flour and lemon cup.
5. Choose the oven container and mix on.
6. Bake in the middle fire until the veuuml was angry.
7. Pirince 1.
8. 5 coffee cups add chicken water, salt and pepper.
9. Saffron with a meal of water, watering with rice.
10. Take chicken bud and rice into the serving plate.
11. 11. 11. 11. döetc on the döetc.

zucchini-chips-lezzet.name: Zucchini Chips
instructions: 2. Fine slice of coarse when heated the oven.
3. blend the eggplants with olive oil and vinegar.
4. Listen for 10 minutes.
5. Then rub the pumpkins into the oven tray with oily paper and sprinkle salt on the car.
6. Cook for about 2 hours.
7. After cooking process you can serve hot or cold.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

zucchini-potato-and-carrot-puree-for-bab.name: Zucchini, Potato And Carrot Puree For Babies
zucchini-potato-and-carrot-puree-for-bab.original_name: Puré de calabacín, patata y zanahoria para bebés
instructions: Wash and weigh carrots and potato. Wash the pumpkin and remove the ends. Cut all vegetables into small and uniform pieces to facilitate cooking and purée production.

We put the potatoes and carrots in a bowl, we cover them with water, we put them on low heat, we add the pumpkin and we leave them with fire about 15 more minutes till the vegetable's cooked. Jumping everything with a mixer and passing it through the pasha. To enrich the taste and increase the amount of healthy fats, you can add an extra teaspoon of virgin olive oil to purée.
